chapter_title.en: People's love for the world as their mother

text: ٣٠٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): النَّاسُ أَبْنَاءُ الدُّنْيَا، وَلاَ يُلاَمُ الرَّجُلُ عَلَى حُبِّ أُمِّهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 303. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: People are the progeny of the world and no one can be blamed for loving the mother.
